title: Audit Finding (base)
description: Base contract for findings produced by audits in interface-audits. Audit-specific extensions live in audits/<name>/schemas/finding.extensions.json and may only add fields.

id.description: Audit-prefixed finding ID, e.g. CL-01. Pattern: 2-4 uppercase letters, hyphen, digits.

section.description: Audit section name in snake_case (e.g. power_preservation).

secondary_section.description: Optional cross-section listing if the finding touches multiple sections.

surface.description: Where in the product the finding was observed.

evidence_summary.description: Inline description of the evidence captured for this finding. Should describe state, surface, dataset, screenshot ref, etc.

severity_note.description: Optional explanation of severity classification, especially when an audit precondition applies.
